tasks.title: Initialize Kimi persistent task memory
tasks.summary: Created kimi.json in server/src/memory/ and wired it into the MCP memory server so future Kimi sessions can recover context, continue tasks, and avoid duplicating work.
notes: Kimi task memory follows the same schema as Codex task memory for consistency.
Available MCP tools: kimi_task_upsert, kimi_task_list, kimi_task_get, kimi_task_get_active.

tasks.title: Enable Kimi persistent task tracking
tasks.summary: User requested Kimi start tracking tasks persistently. Updated kimi.json and AGENTS.md to formalize the requirement, mirroring Codex task memory rules.
notes: Mirrors Codex task memory rules for consistency.
MCP tools available: kimi_task_upsert, kimi_task_list, kimi_task_get, kimi_task_get_active.
